scripts.eink-test: npm run setup-display --silent && SQUELCH_DISPLAY_TEST=1 SQUELCH_DISPLAY_MODE=eink SQUELCH_DISPLAY_PYTHON=pygame-display/.venv-pygame-display/bin/python3 node index.js ws://meadia:51515
scripts.lcd-test: npm run setup-display --silent && SQUELCH_DISPLAY_TEST=1 SQUELCH_DISPLAY_MODE=lcd SQUELCH_DISPLAY_PYTHON=pygame-display/.venv-pygame-display/bin/python3 node index.js ws://meadia:51515
